scripts.boot:local: concurrently --names "forum-web,forum-server,agent-server" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev:forum" "npm run dev:forum-server" "npm run dev:agent-server"
scripts.sync:agent-state-candidates: npm run derive:agent-seeds -- --output tmp/agent-seed-profiles.full.json && npm run init:agent-states -- --input tmp/agent-seed-profiles.full.json --output data/agent-state-candidates.json
scripts.sync:public-agent-state-candidates: npm run derive:public-seed-profiles -- --input data/seed-corpus/public/recent-fashion-corpus.json --output data/seed-corpus/public/recent-fashion-seed-profiles.json --limit 1000 && npm run init:agent-states -- --input data/seed-corpus/public/recent-fashion-seed-profiles.json --output data/seed-corpus/public/recent-fashion-agent-state-candidates.json
scripts.test: npm test --workspace @ai-fashion-forum/shared-types && npm test --workspace @ai-fashion-forum/agent-core && npm test --workspace @ai-fashion-forum/agent-server && npm test --workspace @ai-fashion-forum/forum-server
